content: Google Places API opening hours data is unreliable: (1) Many places lack opening_hours entirely - not all place types have it. (2) Special hours (holidays, temporary closures) not reflected in API data - known bug in issue tracker. (3) API data lags real business changes by days to weeks. (4) Opening hours in API are stored in local timezone but field migration issues (open_now, utc_offset) caused confusion between legacy and new API. (5) Place IDs can become stale (business closed/moved) returning NOT_FOUND - recommended to refresh cached IDs after 12 months.
